items.title: Serena Williams returns - why now, and what next?
items.summary: Serena Williams is doing the unthinkable and returning to professional tennis at the age of 44 after almost four years away from the sport.

items.title: Billam-Smith – how to win a boxing staredown
items.summary: How do you win a boxing staredown? Two fighters going head to head to glower at one another is an essential feature of the build-up to a fight in the modern sport.

items.title: Humble, powerful, ready - Semenyo returns to where World Cup rise began
items.summary: Before heading to the World Cup with Ghana, a friendly against Wales brings Manchester City's Antoine Semenyo back to Newport where he first caught the eye.

items.title: How Cornish miners brought football to Mexico
items.summary: As Mexico prepares to become the first country to host or co-host the World Cup three times, BBC Sport looks at its Cornish footballing roots.

items.title: World Cup 2026: How to follow on the BBC
items.summary: The biggest World Cup in history starts on 11 June and there are more ways to follow it on the BBC than ever before.

items.title: Tuchel tackles questions from team of under-11s
items.summary: England head coach Thomas Tuchel fields questions from under-11 players before his team head to the World Cup.
